articles.headline: Rare 6.1 earthquake off Cuba shakes South Florida
articles.summary: The largest Gulf of Mexico quake ever recorded by modern instruments was felt across Miami; several buildings, including the Stephen P. Clark Government Center, were evacuated.

articles.headline: World Cup fever takes over Miami ahead of matches in Miami Gardens
articles.summary: Thousands packed Bayfront Park for the FIFA Fan Fest as Miami prepares for seven World Cup matches.

articles.headline: Record Tri-Rail ridership as transit strains under growth
articles.summary: South Florida transit is reporting record ridership amid rapid growth, sharpening debates over congestion and the cost of living.

articles.headline: Miami prepares to host the 2026 G20 summit
articles.summary: Preparations are underway for the G20 summit in Miami, drawing global attention and heavy security planning.
